-- See Hoogle, http://www.haskell.org/hoogle/


-- | GHC BigNum library
--   
--   This package used to provide the low-level implementation of the
--   standard <a>BigNat</a>, <a>Natural</a> and <a>Integer</a> types. Use
--   `base:GHC.Num.{Integer,Natural,BigNat}` instead or other modules from
--   `ghc-internal`.
@package ghc-bignum
@version 1.4
